articles.original_title: Lakers unlikely to sign DeMar DeRozan in free agency
articles.summary: One of the time-honored traditions of NBA free agency is finding some way to link the Lakers and DeMar DeRozan. No player has been connected more to the franchise without ever actually playing for them. Between trade rumors and repeated free agent pushes, DeRozan has flirted with joining the Lakers time and time again. It […]
